d"d3d$
d4d5d
d"d7d$
    As https://bugs.python.org/issue23058 indicate, argument parser should
    not have subparser sharing the same argument and destination.
    For subparser, we add common options as 'child_xxx' destination.
    For default value, False is the only allowed default value in root.
    rk
-vz	--version
versionz
%s %sr
actionr
--uriZ
storez
<URI>z
%suriz,Uniform resource identifier (env LSMCLI_URI))
type
metavar
dest
helpz
--prompt
store_truez
%spromptz)Prompt for password (env LSMCLI_PASSWORD))
--humanz
%shumanz:Print sizes in human readable format
(e.g., MiB, GiB, TiB)z
--tersez
%ssepz
<SEP>z;Print output in terse form with "SEP" as a record separator)
--enumz
%senumFz3Display enumerated types as numbers instead of text)
defaultr
--forcez
%sforcez3Bypass confirmation prompt for data loss operationsz
--waitz
%swaitz+Command timeout value in ms (default = 30s))
--headerz
%sheaderz
Include the header with tersez
%s_asynczmRun the command async. Instead of waiting for completion.
 Command will exit(7) and job id written to stdout.z
--scriptz
%sscriptzMDisplaying data in script friendly way with additional information(if exists)i0u

(VOLUMES, POOLS, FS)z

(EXPORTS)z

(DISKS)z

<BLK_COUNT>z;Number of blocks to replicate.
This is repeatable argument.z!volume-replicate-range-block-sizez2Size of each replicated block on a system in bytesz
volume-dependantsz>Returns True if volume has a dependant child, like replicationz
volume-dependants-rmz
Removes volume dependenciesz
volume-access-groupz4Lists the access group(s) that have access to volumez
volume-maskz>Grants access to an access group to a volume, like LUN Maskingz
volume-unmaskz7Revoke the access of specified access group to a volumez
volume-enablez

volume-disablez Disable block access of a volumez

display_available_plugins
z!CmdLine.display_available_pluginsc
        Walk the command line argument list and build up a new command line
        with the appropriate substitutions which is then passed to argparse, so
        that we can avoid adding more sub parsers and do all argument parsing
        before the need to talk to the library
        :return copy of command line args with alias expansion:
        r+
